descriptions: A Satanas member killed a Lemonwood Chiques member.
edges.evidence_quote: In November 1989 Manuel Rodriguez, a member of the Lemonwood Chiques gang, was shot and killed by Arnell Salagubang, a member of the Satanas gang.

descriptions: Matranga brothers extorted and intimidated the Provenzano family, leading to a gang war.
edges.evidence_quote: They eventually began moving in on Provenzano fruit loading operations intimidating them with threats of violence.

People Nation.description: The People Nation is an American alliance of street gangs based in Chicago, founded in 1978 by leaders of the Vice Lords, Black P. Stones, and Latin Kings. It is a multiethnic coalition involved in drug trafficking, robbery, money laundering, and murder. The alliance is known for its rivalry with the Folk Nation and uses symbols such as a five-pointed star and left-sided identifiers.

descriptions: BPSN is a member of the People Nation alliance.
edges.evidence_quote: part of the large Chicago gang alliance known as the People Nation

descriptions: Gaylords are a member of the People Nation alliance.
edges.evidence_quote: The gang is part of the People Nation alliance

descriptions: North Side Popes rival People Nation.
edges.evidence_quote: Rivals: People Nation

descriptions: The infobox lists People Nation as a rival.
edges.evidence_quote: Rivals: People Nation , Folk Nation , Gangster Disciples , La Raza Nation , Gangster Two Six , Satan's Disciples , Latin Kings

descriptions: The Saints joined the People Nation for protection in prison.
edges.evidence_quote: By the late 1980s to early 1990s, many Saint gang members were incarcerated within the prison system which led the Saints to join the People Nation for protection.

descriptions: The Vice Lords are a founding member of the People Nation alliance.
edges.evidence_quote: It is a founding member of the People Nation multi-gang alliance.

descriptions: Bloods are affiliated with People Nation.
edges.evidence_quote: These symbols are meant to show the Bloods' affiliation with the People Nation, a large coalition of affiliates created to protect alliance members in federal and state prison.

'Ndrina Mammoliti.description: The Mammoliti are a powerful 'ndrina of the 'Ndrangheta based in Oppido Mamertina and Castellace, Calabria. They are involved in drug trafficking, extortion, agricultural activities, and have practiced kidnapping. They have bases in Germany, particularly in Baden-Württemberg and Bavaria. The Mammoliti-Rugolo are allied with the Piromalli, Varone, and Mazzaferro clans.

descriptions: Barbaro and Mammoliti were in conflict in the Castellace feud, won by Mammoliti.
edges.evidence_quote: Faida di Castellace faida nata nel 1954 e durata fino al 1978 tra i Barbaro e i Mammoliti, e vinta da questi ultimi.

descriptions: The Barbaro were involved in a feud with the Mammoliti in the 1950s.
edges.evidence_quote: Negli anni Cinquanta, quando risiedevano ancora a Castellace furono coinvolti in una faida con i Mammoliti.

descriptions: Barbaro 'ndrina fought a feud with Mammoliti 'ndrina in the 1950s.
edges.evidence_quote: In the 1950s the clan was involved in a bloody feud with the Mammoliti 'ndrina

descriptions: Barbaro 'ndrina fought a feud with Mammoliti 'ndrina.
edges.evidence_quote: In the 1950s the clan was involved in a bloody feud with the Mammoliti 'ndrina

descriptions: Mammoliti supported De Stefano against Tripodo.
edges.evidence_quote: the De Stefanos won a monopoly ... with the support of the Piromalli and Mammoliti 'ndrine

descriptions: The Mammoliti cosca supported the De Stefano clan in the aftermath of the war.
edges.evidence_quote: They won a monopoly of construction work in northern Reggio Calabria, moving the rival Tripodo group out of the market of public work contracts with the support of the Piromalli and Mammoliti cosche.

descriptions: Mammoliti supported the new faction alongside De Stefano.
edges.evidence_quote: la posizione di Piromalli venne appoggiata dalle nuove leve, come i De Stefano di Reggio Calabria, ma anche dai Mammoliti

descriptions: Mammoliti-Rugolo supported Ferraro-Raccosta during the feud.
edges.evidence_quote: Nel 2003, ormai in carcere, Saverio Mammoliti si dissocia dall'organizzazione e confessa che durante la faida i Mammoliti dettero l'appoggio ai Ferraro-Raccosta

descriptions: La Maggiore (Nirta Scalzone) was involved with Mammoliti in the Locale di Aosta.
edges.evidence_quote: Il 23 gennaio 2019 in Valle d'Aosta vengono arrestate 16 persone ... riconducibili ai Nirta Scalzone, ai Raso e ai Mammoliti

descriptions: Mammoliti is a clan within the 'Ndrangheta organization.
edges.evidence_quote: The Mammoliti 'ndrina ... is a powerful clan of the 'Ndrangheta

descriptions: Mammoliti and Barbaro were in a faida (feud) starting in the 1950s.
edges.evidence_quote: Negli anni Cinquanta scoppia una faida con i Barbaro di Castellace .

descriptions: Mammoliti clan was involved in a bloody feud with the Barbaro clan in the 1950s.
edges.evidence_quote: Feud with the Barbaro clan

edges.evidence_quote: Dal 2011 sembra riesplosa la faida tra le due consorterie e questa volta sarebbero stati coinvolti anche i Mammoliti a favore di questi ultimi.

descriptions: Mammoliti sided with Ferraro-Raccosta against the Mazzagatti-Polimeni-Bonarrigo alliance.

edges.evidence_quote: I Piromalli fecero un patto con le 'ndrine dei Pesce, Mancuso, De Stefano, Mammoliti e Avignone, per gestire le enormi ricchezze che sarebbero arrivate e per evitare una futura guerra.

edges.evidence_quote: Il 6 marzo 2009 vengono arrestati ... Antonio e Domenico Pizzata, dei Mammoliti detti i fischianti, che gestivano un traffico di droga tra Milano e San Luca.

descriptions: Basilischi were actually formed by Saverio Mammoliti of the Mammoliti family.

descriptions: The PKK lists the Patriotic Union of Kurdistan as an ally.
edges.evidence_quote: Allies: ... Patriotic Union of Kurdistan

Sons of Satan Motorcycle Club.description: One percenter outlaw motorcycle club based in Lancaster, Pennsylvania, founded in 1949 by returning WWII veterans. Originally a family-oriented club, it became a violent gang under John 'Satan' Marron, who later became National President of the Pagan's Motorcycle Club. The club is a brother club to the Pagans and wears a diamond 'P' patch to signify allegiance. Its clubhouse was destroyed by a pipe bomb in 2002, suspected to be by Hells Angels.

descriptions: Sons of Satan is a rival motorcycle gang of the Hells Angels.
edges.evidence_quote: Rival motorcycle gangs include the ... Sons of Satan

descriptions: The Hells Angels are suspected of bombing the Sons of Satan clubhouse, indicating a hostile rivalry.
edges.evidence_quote: On December 13, 2002, the Sons of Satan clubhouse was destroyed by a pipe bomb explosion while the building was unattended. Although authorities believe it to be the work of rival motorcycle gang, the Hells Angels , the case has yet to be officially solved.

descriptions: The Pagans' expansion led to a brief conflict with the Sons of Satan.
edges.evidence_quote: During the 1960s, The Pagans began moving north into Central Pennsylvania which sparked a brief conflict between the two clubs.

descriptions: The Sons of Satan are a brother club to the Pagans, indicating a cooperative alliance.
edges.evidence_quote: Sons of Satan Motorcycle Club , known locally as The Sons , is a one percenter outlaw motorcycle club and brother club for the Pagan's Motorcycle Club .

descriptions: After the conflict, the Sons of Satan came under Pagan oversight, becoming a subordinate club.
edges.evidence_quote: The conflict was resolved when Sons of Satan President John Marron and Pagans' President Fred 'Dutch' Burhans formally met and became close friends. Marron and a few select Sons members soon moved over to the Pagans while the remaining Sons were allowed to continue their club under Pagan oversight.

descriptions: Pizzimenti is listed as an allied 'ndrina of Romeo.
edges.evidence_quote: 'Ndrine alleate - Pizzimenti

descriptions: Bandada Inquisidora Vengativa is a cell of ITS in Chile.
edges.evidence_quote: The cell “ Bandada Inquisidora Vengativa ”, another ITS group in Chile, took responsibility for an incendiary artifact

descriptions: A former member of G-Shine Bloods allegedly co-founded the Dixon Bloods, indicating a structural link.
edges.evidence_quote: Unconfirmed rumours state that one of the founding members of the gang was a former member of a New York-based gang known as G-Shine Bloods, who had relocated to the neighborhood in the early 2000s.

descriptions: LPK was a precursor that played a crucial role in creating the KLA.
edges.evidence_quote: A key precursor to the Kosovo Liberation Army was the People's Movement of Kosovo (LPK).

descriptions: Muslim Boys are a splinter faction of PDC.
edges.evidence_quote: A faction of the PDC meanwhile broke off and converted to Islam in search of an identity while still continuing to engage in crime. This group, known as the 'Muslim Boys'

descriptions: Aryan Nations Revival is a splinter group of Aryan Nations.
edges.evidence_quote: Based in New York, and led by Jay Faber, Aryan Nations Revival became one of the more well-known splinter groups.

descriptions: Bubbo is intranei (insider) to the Locale di Galbiate together with Trovato.
edges.evidence_quote: sarebbero intranei alla " Locale di Galbiate " con i Trovato

descriptions: Trovato is intranei to the Locale di Galbiate together with Bubbo.
edges.evidence_quote: sarebbero intranei alla " Locale di Galbiate " con i Trovato

Bowe Brothers.description: The Bowe Brothers were a criminal family in New York City during the early-to-mid-19th century, headed by Martin Bowe. The gang operated along the New York waterfront, engaging in theft, robbery, and fencing stolen goods. They were known as shooters, cutters, and thieves in the Fourth Ward, leading raids on dockyards and ships. The gang was active from around 1840 to 1860.

descriptions: Jaish-e-Mohammed is allied with al-Qaeda.
edges.evidence_quote: The following are presently believed to be allied with al-Qaeda: - Jaish-e-Mohammed

descriptions: Jaish-e-Mohammed and al-Qaeda jointly conducted the Daniel Pearl kidnapping and murder.
edges.evidence_quote: Jaish-e-Mohammed organized the kidnapping and murder of Daniel Pearl in an operation run in conjunction with al-Qaeda and funded by bin Laden.

descriptions: Indian police claimed PAFF is an offshoot of Jaish-e-Muhammad.
edges.evidence_quote: The Indian police claimed it is an offshoot of Jaish-e-Muhammad.

descriptions: Jaish-e-Mohammed is listed as a non-state ally of Lashkar-e-Taiba.
edges.evidence_quote: Allies: Non-state allies Jaish-e-Mohammed, Pakistani Taliban, Hizbul Mujahideen, Harkat-ul-Jihad al-Islami, Harkat-ul-Mujahideen, Al-Badr, Al Rashid Trust, Indian Mujahideen, People’s Anti-Fascist Front, Muslim United Liberation Tigers of Assam, Al-Qaeda AQIS AGH

descriptions: LeT and Jaish-e-Mohammed coordinated in the 2001 attack on Indian parliament.
edges.evidence_quote: The Indian government blamed LeT, in coordination with Jaish-e-Mohammed, for a 13 December 2001 assault on parliament in Delhi.

descriptions: LeT and JeM jointly carried out the 2001 Indian Parliament attack.
edges.evidence_quote: News reports, citing security forces, said that the latter suspect that on 13 December 2001 attack on India's Parliament in New Delhi, a joint group from the LeT and the Jaish-e-Mohammed (JeM) were involved.

descriptions: JEM is listed as an opponent of RSF.
edges.evidence_quote: Opponents: ... JEM

descriptions: Aston Villa Hardcore succeeded the Steamers as a hooligan firm.
edges.evidence_quote: The firm have been active since circa 1993, following on from previous Aston Villa hooligan firms the Steamers, C-Crew and Villa Youth.

Clerkenwell crime syndicate.description: English criminal organization based in Clerkenwell, London, founded in the 1980s by Terry Adams and his brothers Tommy and Patrick. Allegedly one of the most powerful in the UK, involved in drug trafficking, extortion, gold bullion hijacking, and security fraud. Linked to 25 gangland murders and connections with South American drug cartels. Influence reportedly decreased from 2000 onwards.

descriptions: The Adams family allegedly ordered the shooting of a former enforcer of the Richardson Gang.
edges.evidence_quote: The shooting of the then 68-year-old "Mad" Frankie Fraser , a former enforcer for The Richardson Gang , in July 1991 was said to have been ordered by the Adams family

descriptions: Hellbanianz is a rival of the A-team.
edges.evidence_quote: Rivals: Kinahan Cartel , A-team , Huyton Firm

Hogan Gang.description: The Hogan Gang was a St. Louis-based criminal organization active during Prohibition, involved in bootlegging, labor slugging, voter intimidation, armed robbery, and murder. Founded around 1917 by Edward "Jelly Roll" Hogan, the gang was predominantly Irish-American but included Italian and Jewish members. They fought a violent gang war with Egan's Rats in the early 1920s and were active from the 1920s to the 1930s.

descriptions: Egan's Rats and Hogan Gang were in a violent conflict after the murder of Willie Egan.
edges.evidence_quote: Egan's Rats soon went to war with the rival Hogan Gang, whom they suspected of killing Willie Egan.

descriptions: Egan's Rats and Hogan Gang fought in the Egan-Hogan War.
edges.evidence_quote: The gangs engaged in the Egan-Hogan War of 1921–23, which resulted in the breakup of Egan's Rats.

descriptions: The infobox lists the Cuckoo Gang as an ally of the Hogan Gang.
edges.evidence_quote: Allies: Cuckoo Gang , Russo Gang

descriptions: The Hogan Gang and Egan's Rats were engaged in a violent gang war.
edges.evidence_quote: They fought a notoriously violent gang war with Egan's Rats in the early 1920s.

descriptions: The Hogan Gang had a close business partnership with the Russo Gang.
edges.evidence_quote: they had a close business partnership with the Russo Gang

descriptions: Alvaro was in conflict with Filleti-De Angelis-Orfeo during the faida di Sinopoli.
edges.evidence_quote: Gli Alvaro, appoggiati dalle famiglie Forgione e Violi, per vent'anni dovettero regolare i conti con i Filleti-De Angelis-Orfeo.

descriptions: Infobox lists PCP (m-l) as an ally of the EPL.
edges.evidence_quote: Allies: Group of Popular Combatants , PCP (m-l) , FARC

'Ndrina Polimeni.description: The Polimeni are a 'ndrina (organized crime clan) of the 'Ndrangheta based in Oppido Mamertina, Italy. They are allied with the Mazzagatti and Bonarrigo clans. From 1992 to 1998 they were involved in a feud with the Ferraro-Raccosta clan, which reignited around 2011. In 2013, the Erinni operation led to arrests and asset seizures, potentially ending the violence.

descriptions: Ferraro (as part of Ferraro-Raccosta) is in conflict with Polimeni.
edges.evidence_quote: Nel 1992 scoppia la cosiddetta faida di Oppido Mamertina tra i Ferraro-Raccosta e i Mazzagatti - Polimeni-Bonarrigo

descriptions: Mammoliti sided against Mazzagatti-Polimeni-Bonarrigo in the feud.
edges.evidence_quote: Dal 2011 sembra riesplosa la faida tra le due consorterie e questa volta sarebbero stati coinvolti anche i Mammoliti a favore di questi ultimi.

descriptions: Mammoliti sided with Ferraro-Raccosta against the Mazzagatti-Polimeni-Bonarrigo alliance.
edges.evidence_quote: Dal 2011, la battaglia tra le due consorterie sembra riesplosa, e questa volta sarebbero stati coinvolti anche i Mammoliti a favore di questi ultimi.

descriptions: Mazzagatti and Polimeni are allied in the conflict against Ferraro-Raccosta.
edges.evidence_quote: Nel 1992 scoppia la cosiddetta faida di Oppido Mamertina tra i Ferraro-Raccosta e i Mazzagatti - Polimeni-Bonarrigo

descriptions: Mazzagatti is allied with Polimeni.
edges.evidence_quote: I Mazzagatti sono una 'ndrina di Oppido Mamertina alleata dei Polimeni e dei Bonarrigo .

descriptions: Polimeni and Bonarrigo are allied in the conflict against Ferraro-Raccosta.
edges.evidence_quote: Nel 1992 scoppia la cosiddetta faida di Oppido Mamertina tra i Ferraro-Raccosta e i Mazzagatti - Polimeni-Bonarrigo

descriptions: Polimeni and Bonarrigo are allied together with Mazzagatti in a feud.
edges.evidence_quote: Dal 1992 al 1998 i Mazzagatti- Polimeni-Bonarrigo sono in faida con i Ferraro-Raccosta .

edges.evidence_quote: I Polimeni sono una 'ndrina di Oppido Mamertina alleata dei Mazzagatti e dei Bonarrigo .

descriptions: Polimeni is in feud with Ferraro.

descriptions: Hells Angels attacked the unsanctioned Windsor Hells Angels.
edges.evidence_quote: On 15 April 1979, a group of up to thirty Hells Angels armed with guns, axes and knives ambushed fifteen members of the rogue Windsor Hells Angels who were sleeping in a car park near Brockenhurst.

descriptions: The pirate network supplies al-Shabaab with weapons.
edges.evidence_quote: These pirates do, however, also supply ISS' rival in Puntland, al-Shabaab, with weapons and other materials.

descriptions: ISS cooperates with Somali pirates for smuggling.
edges.evidence_quote: In smuggling fighters and supplies across the Gulf of Aden, ISS works closely with Somali pirates, namely Mohamed Garfanje's Hobyo-Haradhere Piracy Network and another unidentified group that is based in Qandala.

descriptions: ISS cooperates with the Hobyo-Haradhere Piracy Network.
edges.evidence_quote: In 2017, it was revealed that the Islamic State – Somalia Province works closely with Somali pirates, namely Mohamed Garfanje's Hobyo - Haradhere Piracy Network and another unidentified group that is based in Qandala.
